## Top 10 Ideas (Ranked by Score)

### 🥇 I084 — Score: 19/25
**Title:** Your Stomach Acid Dropped 40% After 60 — Here's What It Does to Your Medications
**Pillar:** Medication Safety / Digestive Health / Pharmacology
**Persona:** A (Vascular Medicine / Urgent Topics)
**Hook Type:** Hidden systemic change + medication safety implication + mechanism depth
**Target Emotion:** Fear + betrayal + empowerment through knowledge
**Competitor Gap:** Kent owns general medication warnings (882K). I035 covers BP+Magnesium. I056 covers medicine cabinet+Vit D. I078 covers liver metabolism. **NO ONE covers stomach acid decline affecting drug absorption.** Completely unowned intersection.
**Unique Mechanism:** Parietal cell decline → pH rises from 1.5 to 3.5+ → enteric coatings dissolve in wrong location → drug absorption drops 30-50% → specific drug classes affected + timing protocol to restore absorption.
**Anti-Template Note:** Opens with a physiological fact (acid drop percentage), not a patient story or fear hook. Structure: mechanism → consequence → specific drug classes → timing protocol.

### 🥇 I088 — Score: 19/25
**Title:** Your Iron Levels Look Normal After 60 — But Your Cells Are Starving (Doctor Explains)
**Pillar:** Blood Health / Nutrient Absorption / Diagnostic Gap
**Persona:** A (Vascular Medicine / Urgent Topics)
**Hook Type:** Medical system failure + hidden cellular deficiency + diagnostic gap
**Target Emotion:** Distrust of normal test results + fear of undiagnosed condition + empowerment
**Competitor Gap:** I071 covers dentures+anemia. **NO ONE covers functional iron deficiency with normal ferritin.** Completely novel diagnostic gap. Affects 15-25% of seniors with "normal" blood work but persistent fatigue.
**Unique Mechanism:** Ferritin is acute-phase reactant → inflammation elevates ferritin masking true iron deficiency → soluble transferrin receptor (sTfR) test reveals cellular iron starvation → 3 conditions that cause functional iron deficiency + sTfR test request script.
**Anti-Template Note:** Opens with a paradox (normal test, starving cells). Structure: paradox → mechanism → hidden test → doctor question script. No fear-mongering — empowers viewers to request a specific test.
